docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MAGDALENA AS TO DEFENDANT MINNA, LUCA ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MAGDALENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINNA, LUCA ,AN INDIVIDUAL $10,593.03 PRINCIPAL, $322.10 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,285.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
